message:
refactor(index,watcher): unify compaction into streaming rewrite_index and hoist runtime into watcher

- Hoist asupersync Runtime creation from per-batch to per-worker/per-watcher,
  passing &Runtime through WatchIngestPipeline::apply_batch to avoid repeated
  short-lived runtime construction overhead
- Extract unified rewrite_index() method from duplicated vacuum()/compact()
  logic with multi-pass streaming: record table build, header write, string
  table, vector copy (fast raw-byte path for Main, encode path for WAL)
- Add MergeSource enum (Main/Wal) for tracking entry provenance during merge
- Add tombstone rollback on WAL write failure for improved crash-consistency
- Remove deprecated repro_bug.rs stub

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,2 +0,0 @@
-// This file is deprecated and its contents have been moved to lib.rs.
-// It can be safely deleted.
